label: Sensors → InfluxDB (generic)
info:
Generic sensor ingester.

Subscribes to MQTT wildcard 'sensors/+/+/+/+' and writes one
InfluxDB row per message, deriving everything from the topic + payload.

Topic format expected:
  sensors/{project}/{position}/{device_id}/{sensor_type}

Payload: any flat JSON of {field: number}. Example (SEN66):
{
  "pm1_0": 0.1, "pm2_5": 0.2, "pm4_0": 0.3, "pm10": 0.4,
  "voc_index": 46, "nox_index": 1,
  "co2_ppm": 711,
  "temperature_c": 26.47, "humidity_rh": 31.51,
  "fw": "0.3.1", "uptime_s": 12345
}

Mapping to InfluxDB:
  measurement = sensor_type     (sen66, scd41, bme680, …)
  tags        = project, position, device_id, fw (if present)
  fields      = every numeric key in the payload
  timestamp   = receive time (no client-side ts expected)

Adding a new sensor type or device requires NO changes to this flow.

name: Route + tag from topic
Inject nodes simulate the three vent-hood positions (pre-filter / post-filter / ambient). Click any to verify ingestion.
